revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA CITATION FIX at cherry_pick_moments[5] (ts 10:21): Split the anti-pattern into two separate issues — (a) rep-accountability failure (Owen asking customer to remind him of his own promised follow-up, no direct schema section, cite coaching_philosophy.handoff_brief_discipline or flag as TBD gap) and (b) personal-number exposure (correctly cite bill_collection.stewart_automated_bill_capture but anchor it to ts 02:50 where the bill photo was requested, not ts 10:21). Remove the conflated single citation. (2) SCHEMA CITATION FIX at cherry_pick_moments[3] (ts 03:09): Replace verify.roof_type_age with a note that the home-improvement cycle stacking pattern is an observed signal not yet formalized in the schema (TBD), and cite coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features as the closest applicable section. (3) MISSED MOMENTS: Add at minimum two of the four flagged missed moments — (a) ts 04:03 (Owen's 'no trees is a blessing' as a partial curiosity-creation moment executed but not extended — positive coaching counterweight) and (b) ts 08:49 (Owen's self-deprecating transparency as a trust_building_micro_trade positive signal). Stage 3 is entirely negative in its cherry-picks; the schema's analysis_directives.trust_building_micro_trades directive requires surfacing positive micro-trades. Additionally: remove the two instances of prescriptive manager-pedagogy language ('replay the clip' at coaching_focus[0] and 'ask him to identify what he missed before the manager names it' at coaching_focus[1]) — these go beyond the schema's scope and are tone overcalibrations. The button_up partial-credit scoring for phone_appointment_specified should be corrected to a miss (required: true, ambiguous = not met).
